title: dactylorhiza elata subsp. munbyana
intro: Dactylorhiza elata subsp. munbyana, also known as Munby's marsh orchid, is a subspecies of terrestrial orchid belonging to the Dactylorhiza elata species. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza elata subsp. munbyana include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its roots are used in traditional medicine, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
